label: frontier • render a chart from workspace data via the chart tool
query: Read metrics.csv in this folder and render a column chart of revenue by month using your chart tool, titled 'Monthly Revenue'. Then tell me which month had the highest revenue.
notes: render_chart surface (renderChartEnabled fixture). The audit demands at least one render_chart call with zero error envelopes — pinning that the model passes raw CSV + column refs correctly on the first try instead of fumbling the schema.

workspaceFiles.contents:
month,revenue
Jan,1200
Feb,2400
Mar,1800
Apr,3100
May,2200
